contract_summary: This function shares the proxy of 'old' label with 'new' label by transferring a proxy reference from old to new, while also incrementing the refcount of the new label (via __aa_proxy_redirect). It unconditionally succeeds. After calling this function, the caller should consider that the new label has an extra reference and must be released appropriately (e.g., via aa_put_label) when no longer needed. The proxy reference management is internal; the caller does not need to manually get or put the proxy.
